tagline: A mana-talent hierarchy where five-leaf corruption and anti-magic nullification define the ceiling — and Julius Novachrono's time magic sits above all.
visualizationReason: Black Clover's combat system is defined by mana hierarchy and anti-magic nullification — the counter-tree maps how mana tier, anti-magic negation, and time dilation create a strict combat dominance ordering.

headerFlavor.loreQuote: I'll show you what a man with nothing can do!
headerFlavor.sysWarning: // [SYS_OP]: MANA DETECTION ACTIVE — GRIMOIRE CLASSIFICATION ENFORCED

hero.microHook: No magic? No problem. I'll cut through it all.
hero.thesis: Black Clover's power ceiling is defined by mana capacity and anti-magic nullification — but the five-leaf grimoire and Julius's time magic represent system anomalies that transcend the normal hierarchy.

powerSystem.name: Mana Zone
powerSystem.subtitle: Mana Sensing and Amplification
powerSystem.loreDesc: The highest level of magic control: surrounding yourself with mana to increase the power and precision of all spells beyond normal limits.
powerSystem.systemDesc: An environmental mana capture system that scales spell output by 10x through surrounding the caster with ambient mana.
powerSystem.signatureMoment: Yami achieving Mana Zone against the elf Licita.

powerSystem.name: Anti-Magic
powerSystem.subtitle: Mana Nullification
powerSystem.loreDesc: Asta's five-leaf clover grimoire contains a devil named Liebe, granting him Anti-Magic — the ability to nullify all magic.
powerSystem.systemDesc: A permanent counter-capability: Anti-Magic cancels mana itself, not specific spells, giving zero-cancel against any magical opponent.

rankings.topTierLore: The supreme capability tier in Black Clover.
rankings.topTierSystem: Maximum capability across all measured dimensions.

tiers.name: A-Tier
tiers.loreDesc: Exceptional capability holders with system-shaping influence.

tiers.name: B-Tier
tiers.loreDesc: Competent operators with meaningful impact potential.

factions.name: Black Clover Universe
factions.loreDesc: The primary world of the story.

rules.name: Mana Determines Magical Ceiling
rules.loreDesc: The amount of mana a mage possesses directly determines their combat potential — those with more mana can overwhelm those with less regardless of skill.
rules.systemDesc: A resource-capability correlation: mana volume = tier placement in the combat hierarchy.

rules.name: Anti-Magic Cancels All Magic
rules.loreDesc: Asta's Anti-Magic doesn't counter specific spells — it nullifies the mana substrate itself.
rules.systemDesc: A universal counter: capability ceiling removal against any magical opponent.

counterplay.mechanic: Mana Zone dominates standard opponents through environmental capture.
counterplay.loreDesc: Mana Zone proves superior against standard threats.
counterplay.systemDesc: An environmental mana capture system that scales spell output by 10x through surrounding the caster with ambient mana.

causalEvents.name: Story Begins
causalEvents.trigger: The inciting incident that sets the narrative in motion.
causalEvents.consequence: Protagonist is forced to engage with the system.
causalEvents.loreDesc: The initial condition that creates the narrative premise.

anomalies.name: Unique Capability
anomalies.loreDesc: The protagonist possesses a capability that transcends normal system rules.
anomalies.systemDesc: A system anomaly: Black Clover's power ceiling is defined by mana ca...
anomalies.impact: Creates asymmetric advantage against normal opponents.

systemQuestions.question: What makes Black Clover's system unique?
systemQuestions.answer: A mana-talent hierarchy where five-leaf corruption and anti-magic nullification define the ceiling — and Julius Novachrono's time magic sits above all.
